caption: A man is seated at a dark table in a studio setting, wearing a black hoodie with "BOSS" and "T" in gold lettering, a white baseball cap, and a gold watch. He sits before a professional microphone on a boom arm and wears headphones. In the background, a white wall features a logo with stars and the words "URBAN HUSTLE," while a blue sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". On the table, a black mug displays the text "BOSS TALK 101". Throughout the sequence, the man appears pensive, resting his head on his hand. He shifts his posture slightly and adjusts the brim of his white cap with his right hand. The camera remains stationary, capturing his subtle movements as he looks slightly downward and to the side while remaining seated in the podcast environment.
